name: Metal Shooter Brother Squad
description: Metal Shooter Brother Squad is an action-packed shooting game where players join a squad of elite metal soldiers to take on waves of enemies and powerful bosses. With retro-style graphics, intense firefights, and unique characters, players can enjoy fast-paced, side-scrolling action as they unlock weapons, upgrade abilities, and aim for victory in thrilling missions. Web Dev <a href='https://www.kizi10.org/'>https://www.kizi10.org/</a>
instructions: Use mouse to controll the joystick in the game Press S to fire with the gun D is to throw grenade and SPACE is to jump
tags: 2D, Cartoon, Fire, Gun, Mentolatux, Shooting, Unity3D
